generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLiDARData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelD435iDepthData
]

instance HokuyoLiDARData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance IntelD435iDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435i
]

instance HokuyoLiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslation, PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance IntelD435iRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth and visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelD435iDepthData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslation
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracking information from LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCController
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control model for vehicle speed regulation and lead vehicle detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCController
]

instance DataCollection : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for sensor input acquisition from physical sensors via UDP over Wi-Fi"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HokuyoLiDARRawData, IntelD435iRawData
]

instance DataTranslation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Converts raw sensor data into standardized formats, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions using ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HokuyoLiDARRawData, IntelD435iRawData
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTracking : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Preprocesses LiDAR point clouds for object tracking and clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HokuyoLiDARRawData
]

instance ACCController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for ACC control, managing speed regulation and lead vehicle detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackData
]

instance DataStorage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Structured data persistence using SQL database for historical records"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HokuyoLiDARRawData, IntelD435iRawData
]

instance ActuationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into precise motor voltage signals via PWM"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor speed regulation via PWM"
]

instance DCMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "DC motor for vehicle propulsion"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for directional control"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Control Panel for remote management of ACC functions"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time monitoring"
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving path, detected object tracks, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system computations (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance) to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputationOffloadingAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote management of ACC functions including enabling/disabling, speed setting, and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving path, and detected object tracks"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Diagnostic reports generated from collected data for troubleshooting"
]

instance ComputationOffloadingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system computations to cloud resources for safety-critical functions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling ACC functions remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disabling ACC functions remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting target speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggering emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LX, IntelDeepsenseD435i, VedderElectronicSpeedController, DCMotor, SteeringServo
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataCollection, DataTranslation, PointCloudClusteringTracking, ACCController, DataStorage, ACCModel
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ControlPanel, ThreeDVisualization
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., ACC, steering, motor actuation) are processed by the Controlling FE and Data Translation component, which serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions. Commands are communicated via ROS2 within the Digital Twin and UDP over Wi-Fi between entities to the Actuation FE for physical actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy between physical and digital components for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by industry standards with hardware limitations necessitating this specific timeframe."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architected per ISO 23247 RA, software components are mapped to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. Each entity (Physical, Digital, User) is deployed on dedicated hardware, with the Physical Twin Entity extending beyond the standard's OME to handle general automotive functionality. System-wide coordination relies on 100 ms time synchronization accuracy for computation offloading, and the User Interface FE is subdivided into 3D Visualization and Control Panel components within the User Entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is utilized across multiple lifecycle stages, including the design phase of automotive systems, during vehicle operation for real-time monitoring, and as a product lifecycle management tool to track and optimize the entire product lifecycle from development to end-of-life."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DTS maintains a maximum network latency of 100 ms from the vehicle to the DT Entity. Communication protocols include ROS2 for intra-entity software components and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication. Each entity is deployed on separate hardware components, as shown in the Architecture and deployment view (Fig. 2)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Data storage is external to the vehicle per Requirement R3, with computational tasks offloaded to cloud infrastructure as specified in Section III.A. Each entity is deployed on dedicated hardware components, supporting scalable cloud-based deployment models."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard for Digital Twin framework in manufacturing, specifically Part 2 (Reference Architecture), which defines an entity-based structure including Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) handle specific tasks such as actuation, data transformation, and user interfacing, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) cited as an example implementation for interoperability."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system complies with ISO 15622:2018 performance requirements for Adaptive Cruise Control systems and adheres to the latency specifications defined in 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2X services to ensure safety-critical operations through timely data exchange."
]
